# openai_project_role (Data Source)

Use this data source to look up a specific role by name within an OpenAI project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a project role by name
data "openai_project_role" "deployer" {
  project_id = var.project_id
  name       = "Model Deployer"
}

output "role_id" {
  value = data.openai_project_role.deployer.role_id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the role to look up (case-insensitive).
- `project_id` (String) The ID of the project to look up the role in.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The description of the role.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `permissions` (List of String) Permissions granted by the role.
- `predefined_role` (Boolean) Whether the role is predefined and managed by OpenAI.
- `resource_type` (String) Resource type the role is bound to (e.g., 'api.project').
- `role_id` (String) The ID of the role.
